title: Multiple choice column
excerpt: Does anyone know if it’s possible to set up a multiple choice column to use in a field. I want the user to only be able to choose a single value. The Dropdown column allows users to select multiple options and the Status…

posts.author: kerstyn (Kerstyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if it’s possible to set up a multiple choice column to use in a field. I want the user to only be able to choose a single value. The Dropdown column allows users to select multiple options and the Status column doesn’t seem to work in forms.

posts.author: kerstyn (Kerstyn)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re right, status does work. I can’t have tested it properly the first time that I tried it.
